gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/395)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/395)
text: رَجُلٍ أَكَلَ مِنْ لَحْمِ صَيْدٍ لَا يَدْرِي مَا هُوَ وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ دَمُ شَاةٍ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a man who ate from the flesh of a hunted prey not knowing what it was, and he was in Ihraam. Heasws said: ‘Upon him is blood of a sheep’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from in a marfu‘ manner the following: “About a man who in the state of Ihram eats of the flesh of a prey and does not know what it is, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’He owes one sheep.’”
